Name: Baron John Stewart, 2nd. Lord of Lorne  
Born: 1397, in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland
Common-law husband of Baroness Agnes MacDonald, 1427, Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne於1397年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾時，他的父親Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn11歲，母親Lady Joan Stewart of Albany18歲。他於1446年之前與Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1463年12月20日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特奧班享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne于1397年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾格勒諾爾时，他的父亲Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn11岁，母亲Lady Joan Stewart of Albany18岁。他于1446年之前与Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1463年12月20日在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特奧班享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾登可爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne was born in 1397, in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn, was 11 and his mother, Lady Joan Stewart of Albany, was 18. He married Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich before 1446, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 20 December 1463, in Oban, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne est né en 1397, à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Stewart of Albany, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich avant 1446, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1463, à Oban, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne 1397 in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn 11 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Stewart of Albany 18. Er hat vor 1446 in Argyll, Scotland Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Dezember 1463 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Oban, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne è nato il nel 1397 nel Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Stewart of Albany, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich prima del 1446, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 dicembre 1463, nel Oban, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorneが1397年にスコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイで生まれた時，父Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lornは11歳，母Lady Joan Stewart of Albanyは18歳であった。1446年以前にスコットランドアルグイルでIsabelle MacLaren of Ardveichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1463年12月20日にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトオバンで66歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアダンケルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunstaffnage Castle, Oban, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오반
ko.lifeSummary: John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne(이)가 1397년 스컷랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Stewart of Albany(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1446년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 12월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오반에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich antes 1446, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.Dunstaffnage Castle, Oban, Scotland: обань, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne родился в 1397 г. в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Stewart of Albany, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle MacLaren of Ardveich перед 1446 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 декабря 1463 г. в местности обань, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия.
